## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly check-in between Ramp and GrowthX to discuss content refresher workflow, SEO performance, and treasury-related content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/tBzTDRXWG_fpcVT3znzhaVtxkFiQx-44?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX has significantly improved their refresher workflow, allowing for more granular control and faster processing](https://fathom.video/share/tBzTDRXWG_fpcVT3znzhaVtxkFiQx-44?tab=summary&timestamp=15.0)
  - [SEO performance is holding steady, with expense category pages showing the highest jump in impressions and clicks](https://fathom.video/share/tBzTDRXWG_fpcVT3znzhaVtxkFiQx-44?tab=summary&timestamp=24.0)
  - [Treasury-related content strategy needs refinement, focusing on business savings accounts and rate comparisons rather than traditional treasury management topics](https://fathom.video/share/tBzTDRXWG_fpcVT3znzhaVtxkFiQx-44?tab=summary&timestamp=39.0)

## Topics

### Refresher Workflow Improvements

  - [New workflow allows for customized research guidance and refresh instructions](https://fathom.video/share/tBzTDRXWG_fpcVT3znzhaVtxkFiQx-44?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
  - [Supports different types of refreshes (minor enhancements to complete rewrites)](https://fathom.video/share/tBzTDRXWG_fpcVT3znzhaVtxkFiQx-44?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)
  - [Improved processing speed: from 30 minutes to 1 minute for full article generation](https://fathom.video/share/tBzTDRXWG_fpcVT3znzhaVtxkFiQx-44?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
  - [Enhanced control over voice, tone, and style through post-processing phase](https://fathom.video/share/tBzTDRXWG_fpcVT3znzhaVtxkFiQx-44?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)

### SEO Performance Update

  - [Block pages performance holding steady](https://fathom.video/share/tBzTDRXWG_fpcVT3znzhaVtxkFiQx-44?tab=summary&timestamp=1312.0)
  - [Per diem pages showing increased impressions, stable clicks](https://fathom.video/share/tBzTDRXWG_fpcVT3znzhaVtxkFiQx-44?tab=summary&timestamp=1321.0)
  - [Expense category pages experienced highest jump in impressions and clicks](https://fathom.video/share/tBzTDRXWG_fpcVT3znzhaVtxkFiQx-44?tab=summary&timestamp=1339.0)
  - [Top performers: North Carolina, Texas, Louisiana, and pages related to gifts and clothing for employees](https://fathom.video/share/tBzTDRXWG_fpcVT3znzhaVtxkFiQx-44?tab=summary&timestamp=1346.0)
  - [Unexpected spike in office cleaning-related searches, but with low CTR due to mismatched intent](https://fathom.video/share/tBzTDRXWG_fpcVT3znzhaVtxkFiQx-44?tab=summary&timestamp=1393.0)

### Treasury Content Strategy

  - [Initial brainstorming ideas may not align well with Ramp's actual treasury product offering](https://fathom.video/share/tBzTDRXWG_fpcVT3znzhaVtxkFiQx-44?tab=summary&timestamp=1632.0)
  - [Focus shifting towards business savings accounts and rate comparisons](https://fathom.video/share/tBzTDRXWG_fpcVT3znzhaVtxkFiQx-44?tab=summary&timestamp=1688.0)
  - [Challenges: SERPs dominated by bank pages for high-volume searches](https://fathom.video/share/tBzTDRXWG_fpcVT3znzhaVtxkFiQx-44?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [Opportunity: Creating comprehensive comparison tables for business savings account rates](https://fathom.video/share/tBzTDRXWG_fpcVT3znzhaVtxkFiQx-44?tab=summary&timestamp=1778.0)

### Airops Workflow Sharing

  - [Ramp expressed interest in learning about GrowthX's Airops workflow best practices](https://fathom.video/share/tBzTDRXWG_fpcVT3znzhaVtxkFiQx-44?tab=summary&timestamp=1942.0)
  - [GrowthX open to sharing non-production workflow examples and setting up a call to discuss configuration best practices](https://fathom.video/share/tBzTDRXWG_fpcVT3znzhaVtxkFiQx-44?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)

## Next Steps

  - GrowthX to conduct keyword research on proposed treasury topics and refine content strategy
  - Ali to send list of specific bank accounts and bank names for potential rate comparison content
  - GrowthX to explore possibility of scraping bank pages for savings account rate data
  - Vivek to check with Daniel about sharing Airops workflow examples and best practices with Ramp team
  - Continue monitoring SEO performance of recently published and refreshed content
